prompt: Product photograph. Single subject: one tall clear drinking glass filled with creamy vanilla protein shake, pale beige-cream liquid, generous white foam top with natural peaks, fine vanilla seed specks, silver metal straw inserted at slight angle. Subject centered on pure white background. Bright even studio lighting, no colored shadows. No other objects, no surface reflection, no background elements. Clean product cutout style.
negative_prompt: dark background, colored background, shadow on background, other objects, logo, text, watermark, people, second glass, bottle, can
